title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 347.131 - Effective date of merger or consolidation
text:
347.131.  Effective date of merger or consolidation. — A merger or consolidation with a domestic survivor or new domestic limited liability company is effective as of the later of:
  (1)  The date the secretary files the notice of merger or consolidation for record; or
  (2)  The date set forth in the notice of merger or consolidation, not to exceed ninety days after the notice of merger or consolidation is accepted for filing.
(L. 1993 S.B. 66 & 20 § 359.782, A.L. 2004 H.B. 1664)
